title: Section 443
content: All notices, bills, summonses and other documents required by this Act or any rule, regulation or bye-law made thereunder to be served upon, or issued to, any person, shall be served or issued by municipal officers or other municipal employees or by other persons authorised by 1 [the Commissioner].
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 67 of 1993, s. 108, for certain words and brackets (w.e.f. 1-10-1993).
